form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing seventh (31.99) at Q Parklands before going for a three-and-a-half months spell. Looks a danger to the top hope.

form.formComment: First starter by Out Of Range from Brockie Magic. Trained by Robert Cooke. Keep a close eye on the market.

form.formComment: Has raced three times and is overdue for a win, the latest offering a second (25.79) over 457m at this track. Has to be included.

form.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an eye-catching winner scoring by 5 lengths in a Maiden at Capalaba. Worth including on winning run two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an eye-catching winner scoring by 5 lengths in a Maiden at Capalaba. Worth including on winning run two back.

form.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 300m at Q Straight by 6 lengths in a Maiden. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 300m at Q Straight by 6 lengths in a Maiden. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (25.55) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and appears tested on latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (25.55) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.49) when sixth over 457m at this track in a Grade 6. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Others appear better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the winning post shifted out and bumped outside.

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Grafton when only half a length from the winner but did record a convincing 25.23 over the 450m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.
